metadata.terrain_source: Cached AWS elevation-tiles-prod Terrarium DEM tiles, zoom 13.
metadata.projection: Local metre coordinates; x west-east, z south-north, y elevation.
notes: Approximate Lantau coastline mask removes surrounding sea and most nearby islands.
Elevation is vertically exaggerated in the 3D object for legibility; raw metre height is preserved in the heights_m array.
No buildings, vegetation, or man-made structures are included.
